---
title: "Contact"
description: "Contact information."
---

## Contact

**Email:** [sahil.imtiyaz@unicam.it](mailto:sahil.imtiyaz@unicam.it)

## Profiles

Replace the placeholders below with your actual profile links:

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR-SCHOLAR-ID)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-8565-2750)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/YOUR-GITHUB-USERNAME)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-LINKEDIN-ID)


## Collaboration

I am open to collaborations, learning new fields and expertise.
